sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2307" key="ai)qerembate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰθερεμβᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n2307.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to walk in ether,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.328</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
